title: Master of Engineering (M.E.) in Mechanical Engineering
institution: Indian Institute of Engineering Science and Technology (IIEST), Shibpur, West Bengal, India
description: Specialized in Mechanical Engineering with a focus on materials and manufacturing technology.
Emphasis on advanced material synthesis, characterization, and chemical aspects of manufacturing processes through experimental and analytical methods.
Awarded MHRD Fellowship for academic excellence.

thesis.title: Development of ceramic cutting tool material by chemical synthesis
thesis.description: Research focused on synthesizing novel ceramic materials for cutting tools using chemical synthesis methods, aiming to improve wear resistance and thermal stability in machining and manufacturing operations.
